creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
And also change:
                                DWC_OTG_WRITE_4(sc, DOTG_DIEPINT(x),
                                    DIEPMSK_XFERCOMPLMSK);
Into:
                                DWC_OTG_WRITE_4(sc, DOTG_DIEPINT(x),
                                    temp);

--HPS
